title: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Attendant Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for the Attendant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs i...
